final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: social-media-screenshot
Asset type: Douyin live stream screenshot, 9:16 vertical mobile frame
Primary request: screenshot of a live streaming session featuring a female host
Scene/backdrop: Douyin live stream interface with comments scrolling on the left, gift buttons on the right, viewer count at top
Subject: elegant female host (resembling "神仙姐姐"), holding a sign in her hands
Style/medium: mobile UI screenshot, photorealistic live stream capture
Composition/framing: vertical 9:16 frame, host centered, UI elements framing the scene
Lighting/mood: soft ring light on host, warm and inviting live stream atmosphere
Color palette: Douyin brand pink/white UI elements, warm skin tones, neutral background
Text (verbatim): "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！"
Constraints: sign text must be clearly readable in Chinese, host must be holding the sign prominently, live stream UI must look authentic
Avoid: blurry text, distorted facial features, missing UI elements, watermark from other platforms
